As the lamellae advances, vesicles form within the two responding cells starting 14 minutes following laser irradiation. The two other cells within the cluster, not in close proximity (and not sharing extensive membrane contact with the irradiated cell), do not exhibit any visible response following laser irradiation of the targeted cell.
